questions.question: 1. From the simulator, identify the function of the diaphragm in the microscope.

answers.d: Adjusts light intensity for proper visualization

questions.question: 2. In the simulator window, if the image in the microscope appears blurred, what would you do for better visualization of the cells?
3. In H&E staining, how do the nuclei of cardiac muscle cells appear?
4. Long, cylindrical, striated fibres with pink cytoplasm and multiple peripheral blue nuclei in H and E stain represent?
5. How do squamous epithelial cells appear under H&E stain?

answers.c: Large cell bodies, prominent central nuclei

questions.question: 6. The objective lens used for high-power observation of fine details of the tissues:
